name: How to add your business to point2homes.com
description: Learn how to add your business to Point2Homes.com with our step-by-step guide. Boost your online presence and attract more customers today!
main_title: How to add your business to point2homes.com
richtext:
What is Point2Homes.com and why is it important?

Point2 Homes is a real estate listings website where you can list your property for sale or rent. It helps increase visibility to potential buyers or renters who are actively searching for properties in your area. The website offers marketing tools and features to promote your property and also provides tools and services for real estate professionals to manage and grow their business.

‍

Step-by-step guide to add your business to Point2Homes.com

‍

  1. Go to the Zillow website: https://www.point2homes.com/ and click the 'Advertise for free' link from the top right corner of the homepage.

‍

  1. Let's do a Sale Listing, so click the 'Get Started' button.

‍

  1. Once again, click the 'Post your listings now' button from the homepage.

‍

  1. Create a Point2homes account if you don't already have one. You can sign up using your email address or Facebook, Google account.

‍

  1. After you created your account, you can start adding your listings in your account and they will show up on the portal after your account is validated.

‍

  1. Account validations are done over the phone. If you’re looking to get through the process faster, you can call Point2homes Customer Care team during business hours and ask to be validated.

‍

  1. Right now, Point2homes only accept For Sale listings from licensed real estate professionals. To add rentals or commercial properties, you will have to connect an existing feed to your account.

‍

  1. To preserve the quality of the listings on Point2homes, we currently do not accept FSBO (For Sale By Owner) properties. All agent accounts are manually validated by our Customer Care team, after they ensure the account belongs to a licensed agent.

‍

That's it! Your property is now listed for sale on Point2 Homes, and potential buyers can start viewing it right away. However, there are other websites like Zillow.com that offer similar services for listing your property. If you are interested in listing your property on a platform like Point2Homes.com, you may also consider checking out Lodging-World.com.
